rule_metadata.author: Adithya Chandra and Sushant Kumar Arya, Trellix
rule_metadata.title: Suspicious Command Arguments from Explorer or Wermgr

rules.rule_text:
title: Suspicious Command Arguments from Explorer or Wermgr
id: ebda47a5-173e-493d-93a6-d7123076ee11
status: experimental
description: Detects the suspicious command line arguments from potentially-injected
  versions of explorer or wermgr processes.
references:
- https://www.trellix.com/en-us/about/newsroom/stories/research/demystifying-qbot-malware.html
author: Adithya Chandra and Sushant Kumar Arya, Trellix
date: 2022/04/08
tags:
- attack.discovery
- attack.t1082
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    Image|endswith:
    - \explorer.exe
    - \wermgr.exe
    CommandLine|contains|windash:
    - whoami /all
    - arp -a
    - ipconfig /all
    - net view /all
    - cmd /c set
    - nslookup -querytype=ALL -timeout=10 _ldap._tcp.dc._msdcs
    - nltest /domain_trusts /all_trusts
    - net share
    - netstat -nao
    - net localgroup
    - qwinsta
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: high
